behavior_in_task_description.reason: instruction.md names the Printer enum, printer.rs path, self_update.rs path, stderr_important method name/signature, the return values for each variant, and the ≥3 call sites requirement.

no_solution_leakage.reason: Instruction describes required behavior and method signature but does not provide the exact patch diff or line numbers.

solution_uniqueness_guard.reason: Tests check method name, return values per variant, and ≥3 call sites — any correct alternative fix matching the documented requirements would pass.

tests_verify_behavior_not_text.reason: Tests run cargo check, cargo fmt, cargo clippy as subprocesses, plus AST-like parsing of match arms.

test_not_tautological.reason: f2p tests require specific Enabled/Disabled per variant and ≥3 call sites; a stub cannot satisfy them without the real fix.

behavior_in_tests.reason: Tests cover stderr_important existence, per-variant return values, regression of stderr(), and adoption in self_update.rs, matching all instruction requirements.

informative_test_structure.reason: Tests are grouped with section header comments (Gates, Fail-to-pass, Pass-to-pass, etc.) and descriptive function names.

structured_data_schema.reason: Task produces Rust code changes, not structured data.

no_typos.reason: Paths crates/uv/src/printer.rs and crates/uv/src/commands/self_update.rs and method name stderr_important are consistent across instruction, tests, and solution.

instruction_no_hint_leakage.reason: Instruction names the Printer module and self_update.rs as technical context, which is reasonable scope, without pointing to specific buggy lines.
